MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde; Clerk: L. Fong; Matter Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances on Wednesday, August 27, 2014:
Plaintiff Leopodo Cap is present with Attorney Milton Katz (415.441.5400).
Defendant Orlin Chavez is present with Attorney Joseph Bravo of Bravo & Margulies (415.512.6700).

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and/or counsel confer in Room 502B for settlement discussions.
This case does not settle. The trial date of September 2, 2014 remains on calendar.
